他天赋耀眼，身体素质炸裂，成为让全美颤栗的“疯三全能王”，带领校队时隔26年重返巅峰。
【达成荣誉：NCAA最强控卫、王朝缔造者，双一阵记录保持者！】
科比：“别跟我提什么凌晨四点，陈诺凌晨三点就把我晃倒在球馆，然后告诉我，篮筐在他眼里像大海一样宽阔。”
韦德：“如果不是陈诺，我可能只是个普通的球星，是他带我见识了什么是真正的统治力。”
詹姆斯：“全世界都叫我小皇帝，但在陈诺面前，我只想问他什么时候退役，因为只要他在，这个联盟就没有第二个人敢自称GOAT！”
从NCAA的疯狂三月到NBA的冠军王朝，陈诺用手中的篮球告诉全世界： 白金一代，只是他的背景板，这个时代，他君临天下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o563af807387695c1459b9cbf090cb35e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小菠萝U","author_id":"","book_id":"7602616859157875736","book_name":"NBA：从03白金一代开始制霸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a05038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602616862534287896","read_count":"14978","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"128428"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"62","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o563af807387695c1459b9cbf090cb35e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361346&x-signature=TVti9vzhms3oDo6XfdozYWMlIUI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108813590717","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219022678F71C05AA920815F9F1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":902},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7602616859157875736","book_name":"","book_type":"","co
